findings.why: Cables are present and could pose a tripping hazard or snag on equipment.
Headphones are present and could be a source of FOD if they break or are misplaced.
There are some loose items on the surface that could be FOD.

recommended_actions: Secure or remove cables to prevent tripping hazards.
Store headphones in a designated location when not in use.
Clean up loose items on the surface.
